title: Ion8 Water Bottle, 500ml/18oz, Slim Leak Proof & BPA-Free Drinking Bottle, Secure Lock Prevents Spills, Dishwasher Safe, Carry Handle, Ideal for Adults & Kids - Travel, Gym & School, Blue, Dinosaur
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: LEAK-PROOF & CONVENIENT – This bottle ensures smooth-flow hydration without spills. The hygienic flip-top opens easily with one hand, making it perfect for sports or travel use.
EVEN EASIER REFILL – The full-flip lid sits completely back for hassle-free drinking or cleaning. The wide opening allows quick refills, rinses, or adding ice on warm days.
ECO-FRIENDLY & BPA-FREE – Made with Recyclon, a carbon-neutral, plant-based plastic, this BPA-free bottle is reusable, safe, and sustainable—ideal for eco-conscious families.
DISHWASHER SAFE & ODOUR RESISTANT – This dishwasher-safe bottle is food-safe, odour-resistant and easy to clean, keeping drinks fresh, clean, and full of natural flavour.
VERSATILE FOR EVERYONE – Great for school kids or gym-going adults, this leak-proof, reusable bottle supports active lifestyles, sports and daily hydration for all ages.
description: From the manufacturer Previous page Next page 1 Full Flip Lid 2 Easy Carry 3 Easy Clean 4 Award Winning What is Recyclon? Recyclon is a transparent carbon neutral bio-based plastic. Made with plant biomass materials, it also has a lower melting point, which reduces energy used in manufacturing and recycling. Recyclon is a safe material for food containers Can you give me tips on using my ION8 OneTouch bottle? When drinking, you only need to tilt a little, as the spout is positioned to flow perfectly with a minimal tilt. Even a leak-proof bottle can leak if seals are lost or removed. Always check all seals are in place. Spares are readily available. How much water do I need to be well hydrated? The EU recommends 2 to 2.5 liters of fluids daily for adults, including water from food. Aim for 6-8 glasses of water or other beverages. Individual needs vary based on factors like size, age, activity level, climate, and health status. How do I clean my ION8? Before use always rinse the water bottle and cap with cool water. After use always rinse in warm water and dish soap only. You can use the dishwasher in the top rack or on a cool wash. Air dry thoroughly before storing and always store with cap off. How do I care for my ION8 bottle? Do not use brushes or abrasives to scrub, do not freeze when full, do not boil or microwave, do not use for carbonated drinks, do not use in a dishwasher on a very hot wash. Always ensure your leak-proof seals are in place.
